# Amrita Labs

> Amrita Labs builds Chrome extensions and Shopify apps for creators and merchants. Free tools that score, optimize, and improve your workflow — directly inside the platforms you already use.

## Chrome Extensions

- [EmailSubjectScore Pro](https://amrita-labs.com/gmail-subject-score/): Free Chrome extension that scores Gmail subject lines for spam risk, clarity, and urgency in real time. AI-powered rewrite suggestions. 50 free scores/month.
- [Pinello](https://amrita-labs.com/pinello/): Free Chrome extension that scores Pinterest pins across 5 dimensions — image, board fit, title, description, and hashtags — in real time. AI rewrite included.

## Install Links

- [EmailSubjectScore Pro on Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/dleffnbdjohkmmkbojehdpkgkmpofmgm): Score email subject lines as you type in Gmail.
- [Pinello on Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/kmelegdnljikegoemigfgnpcbllmkije): Score Pinterest pins as you create them.

## Shopify Apps

- [Amrita Cookie Consent](https://amrita-labs.com/cookie-consent/): GDPR/CCPA cookie consent banner for Shopify stores.
- [Amrita Chat Widget](https://amrita-labs.com/chat-widget/): Multi-channel chat widget for Shopify — WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, email.
- [Amrita Accessibility Widget](https://amrita-labs.com/accessibility-widget/): WCAG 2.1 accessibility toolbar for Shopify stores.

## Blog

- [5 Best Chrome Extensions for Email Subject Lines (2026)](https://amrita-labs.com/blog/best-email-subject-line-extensions/): Tested comparison of email subject line scoring tools.
- [5 Best Free Chrome Extensions for Pinterest Creators (2026)](https://amrita-labs.com/blog/free-pinterest-chrome-extensions-creators/): Comparison of Pinterest optimization Chrome extensions.
- [Consent Mode V2 Shopify Guide](https://amrita-labs.com/blog/consent-mode-v2-shopify-guide/): How to implement Google Consent Mode V2 on Shopify.
